title: Count the Frames
prompt: This program calls recurse(3), which calls itself down to recurse(0). The debugger session below breaks on recurse, lets it hit that breakpoint on every call (n=3, 2, 1, then 0), then runs `bt`. Count the stack frames bt prints, including main's. Type just the number.
gdbCommands:
break recurse
run
continue
continue
continue
bt
